description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a combination of flat and gable roofs, surrounded by landscaped greenery and a paved driveway. The front facade features a prominent entryway with a covered porch, flanked by symmetrical windows and a garage to one side. The property is bordered by a low wall and lined with trees and shrubs, providing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The rear of the house includes expansive windows and sliding doors, likely opening to a patio or garden area. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with dark roofing and accents, giving it a contemporary yet welcoming appearance. The overall layout suggests a spacious interior with multiple rooms and functional zones.
description: A modern two-story house with a mix of flat and gable roofs, landscaped gardens, and a paved driveway. The exterior features large windows, a covered entryway, and a garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, paved driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a row of trees along the property boundary.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, sliding doors, and a flat-roofed section with green space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, additional landscaping, and the continuation of the driveway and garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and grouped panes
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and flanked by decorative columns and landscaping
